title: Annual Hackathon
description: Join our 24-hour hackathon where you'll collaborate with amazing developers to build innovative solutions and compete for exciting prizes.

title: Web Development Workshop
description: Learn modern web development techniques and best practices from industry experts. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers.

title: Coding Contest
description: Test your problem-solving skills in our competitive coding contest. Compete with peers and showcase your programming prowess.

title: Tech Talk Seminar
description: Hear from industry leaders about the latest trends in AI, blockchain, and cloud computing. Gain insights into future career opportunities.
